mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit.audit_log (tenant_id, user_id, username, operation, target_type, target_id, target_name, ip_address, user_agent, request_params, status, error_message, created_at, log_hash, previous_hash) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{userId}, #{username}, #{operation}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{targetName}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{requestParams}::jsonb, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdAt}, #{logHash}, #{previousHash})
mapper.select: SELECT log_hash FROM audit.audit_log WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit.audit_root_hash (tenant_id, hour_start, root_hash, log_count, created_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{hourStart}, #{rootHash}, #{logCount}, #{createdAt}) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, hour_start) DO UPDATE SET root_hash = #{rootHash}, log_count = #{logCount}
